app.title: beeromat
app.tagline: After the match. After the pint. Without the chaos.

install.title: Install beeromat
install.subtitle: Keep your beer tab one tap from your home screen.
install.iosTitle: Add beeromat to your home screen
install.iosBody: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

menu.label: Install app
menu.browserHint: Find it in your browser menu — ⋮ → Install, or the address-bar icon.

common.error: That didn't work — give it another go.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.welcomeTagline: Beer, banter, and bets for beers.
signIn.expiredLink: That link's expired or already used. We'll send you a fresh one.

magicLink.invalidBody: It's expired or already been used. Ask your club admin to send a fresh one.

setup.title: Set a PIN for signing in
setup.subtitle: A quick 4-digit PIN so you're straight in next time.
setup.invalidFormat: The PIN needs to be exactly 4 digits

unlock.title: Your PIN
unlock.lockedBody: Five wrong tries. Sign in again with the link from your email.
unlock.forgotPinSent: Link sent — check your email to set a new PIN.

match.title: Match
match.subtitle: Whoever lost, buys the beer.
match.hubSubtitle: Plan a match, record the result, settle the beer.
match.upcomingEmpty: No matches scheduled — start one below.

recreate.label: Recreate:
recreate.staleParticipant: Can't recreate — {name} is no longer in the club.
recreate.failed: Couldn't recreate the match. Try again.

closeRound.confirm: End the round? {count, plural, one {# drink} other {# drinks}} logged. The casual bet window closes and a new round starts on the next beer. This can't be undone.

match.pairingLabel: Who pays whom on a loss?
match.pairingHint: Pick the pairing — required for doubles, no default.
match.recordedPending: Result recorded. The bet is waiting to be handed over.
match.recordedPartial: Transferred {transferred} of {requested} — the rest will move when the winner logs another beer.
match.viewerCannotRecord: Only the players (or a treasurer) can record the result.
match.noOpponents: Not enough members yet — invite some mates.
match.partialTransferNote: Transferred {transferred} of {requested} beers — the rest will move when {opponent} logs another.
match.noTransferNote: Match logged. {opponent} hasn't logged a beer yet — move it manually from /bet once they do.
match.undoWindowExpired: Too late to undo — talk to the treasurer.

errors.duplicateMember: Each player can only be in one seat.
errors.memberNotInClub: All players must belong to this club.
errors.notAuthorized: Only the players or a treasurer can record this.
errors.alreadyRecorded: Already recorded — refresh to see the result.
errors.notEditable: Recorded matches can't be edited — undo first.
errors.noBeerInStock: Restock the club before recording a for-beer match.
errors.generic: That didn't work — give it another go.

match.loserBuys: Whoever loses buys {count}× beer for the winner.
match.loserBuysNamed: Whoever loses buys {count}× {beer} for the winner.

matchBet.deliverFailed: Couldn't do that — please try again.
matchBet.writeOffConfirm: Forgive this IOU? {name} won't owe you a beer.
matchBet.writeOffToast: Forgiven — {name} no longer owes you a beer.

round.title: Round
round.submitCta: Log round · {count, plural, one {# beer} other {# beers}}
round.toastLogged: Round logged · {count, plural, one {# beer} other {# beers}} 🍺
round.toastLoggedPartial: Logged, but {names} missed out — out of beer 🍺
round.toastAllSkipped: Couldn't log the round — out of beer.
round.toastError: Couldn't do that — please try again.

errors.duplicateMember: Each person can have only one beer per round.

stats.title: Leaderboards
stats.subtitle: Who's winning and who's buying 🍺🏆
stats.emptyBoard: Nothing yet — go play and drink! 🍺

funline.subscription: {wins}–{losses} vs {name}. It's not a rivalry, it's a subscription. 😅
funline.payUp: Owes {name} {count, plural, one {# beer} other {# beers}} — pay up. 🍺
funline.sugarDaddy: Poured {count, plural, one {# round} other {# rounds}} — the club's sugar daddy. 💸
funline.professional: Averages {avg} beers a night — a true pro. 🍺

onboarding.title: Welcome
onboarding.subtitle: A few details and we're on to the first beer.
onboarding.currencyHint: ISO 4217 code — CZK, EUR, USD, etc.
onboarding.adminEmailHint: We'll send you a sign-in link and make you the admin.
onboarding.bootstrapAlreadyCompleteBody: The club already exists. Sign in instead.

errors.currencyInvalid: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO 4217 code.
errors.defaultLocaleInvalid: Pick one of the supported languages.
errors.adminEmailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
errors.generic: That didn't work — give it another go.

invitation.submitHint: We'll email you a sign-in link.
invitation.acceptedBodyPrefix: We've sent a sign-in link to:
invitation.acceptedBodySuffix: Open it on this phone to finish up.
invitation.errorInvalid: This invite's no longer good. Ask your club admin for a fresh one.
invitation.errorGeneric: That didn't work — give it another go.
invitation.expiredBody: No worries — we can email you a fresh link to the same address.
invitation.resendRateLimited: Hold on a sec — too many tries. Give it a minute and retry.
invitation.resendFailed: Couldn't send a new link — try again in a moment.

magicLink.subject: Your beeromat sign-in link
magicLink.heading: Sign in to beeromat
magicLink.bodyParagraph: Tap the button to sign in. The link is valid for 5 minutes.
magicLink.fallbackLinkLabel: Or paste this link into your browser:
magicLink.signoffParagraph: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

invitation.subject: {inviterName} invited you to {clubName}
invitation.heading: Welcome to {clubName}
invitation.bodyIntro: Hey! {inviterName} invited you to {clubName} on beeromat — the app the club uses to keep tabs on after-match beers.
invitation.bodyPitch: Tap the button to set up your profile and join in.
invitation.fallbackLinkLabel: Or paste this link into your browser:
invitation.ignoreNote: If you don't recognise {inviterName}, you can safely ignore this email.

events.noSessions: No upcoming sessions to RSVP to.
events.goingCount: {count, plural, =0 {Nobody yet} one {# coming} other {# coming}}

vibe.none: Nobody yet — the court's feeling lonely 🎾💨
vibe.solo: Just you so far. Grab a racket and rally off the wall 🎾🧱
vibe.single: Two in — that's a singles match! 🎾 Game on.
vibe.threesome: Three — someone sits out, or you go Canadian doubles 🎾😅
vibe.doubles: Four — perfect for doubles! 🎾🎾 Let's go.
vibe.fiver: Five — doubles plus a sub keeping the beers cold 🍺
vibe.crowd: {count} in — enough for a proper rotation. Tournament vibes 🏆

admin.title: Events
admin.noSessions: No drink sessions to link yet.
admin.manageHint: Recurring sessions are generated automatically every night.

home.wonBeersTotal: 🏆 {count, plural, one {# beer won} other {# beers won}}
home.emptyCatalogAdmin: No beers in the catalog yet. Set one up to get logging.
home.emptyCatalogMember: No beers in the catalog yet — ask your club admin to add some.

openMatch.heading: Match to record
openMatch.many: {count, plural, one {# match waiting for a result} other {# matches waiting for a result}}

matchBet.one: From today's match: {count}× beer on your tab
matchBet.many: From today's matches: {count}× beer on your tab
matchBet.won: You won — {count}× beer on the house tonight 🍺

account.title: Your account
account.displayNameHint: Other members see you under this name.
account.saveFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
account.signOutAllHint: Clears your sign-in on every device.

signOutAll.confirm: You'll be signed out from every device. Next sign-in needs the magic link.

avatar.saveError: Couldn't save the avatar. Try again.

upload.cropSubtitle: Drag to move, corners to resize.
upload.errorOversize: Image is too big. Try a smaller one.
upload.errorInvalidType: Please pick an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP).

errors.generic: That didn't work — give it another go.

payments.title: Payment history
payments.empty: No payments yet — once you settle up, they'll show here.

log.title: Log a beer
log.empty: No beers in the fridge yet — ask whoever runs the stock to add some.

onBehalf.title: Logging for…
onBehalf.noOtherMembers: No other members in this club yet.

errors.targetSelf: Use the regular log button for yourself.
errors.targetNotInClub: That member isn't in this club.

tab.title: Your tab
tab.empty: Nothing yet — go log your first beer.

settle.title: Settle up
settle.awaitingBody: You've flagged {amount} as paid — the treasurer will give it a nod soon.
settle.withdrawnToast: Payment withdrawn — you can pay again.
settle.notSetUpBody: Your club admin hasn't added the bank details — give them a nudge.
settle.scanHint: Scan it with your banking app, then tap below once it's sent.
settle.markedPaid: Nice — the treasurer will confirm it shortly.
settle.claimPending: You've already got a payment waiting to be confirmed.
settle.recordFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
settle.recorded: Got it — the treasurer will confirm it shortly.
settle.noteRequired: Add a quick note (like "cash to the treasurer").

treasurer.nothingPending: Nothing waiting — you're all caught up.
treasurer.disputeBody: Let {name} know their {amount} didn't add up — they'll see why.
treasurer.disputeReasonPlaceholder: e.g. nothing matching on the statement
treasurer.disputeFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
treasurer.undoBody: Take back {name}'s confirmed {amount} — it lands back on their tab.
treasurer.undoFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.

history.title: History
history.noSessions: Nothing yet — your rounds will show up here.

admin.alreadyInvited: There's already an open invite for that email.
admin.inviteFailed: Couldn't send the invite — give it another go.

memberActions.deactivateConfirm: Block {name}? They won't be able to sign in, but their history stays.
memberActions.errorSelf: You can't change your own role or block yourself.

admin.bankingSubtitle: Used to make the payment QR codes for members.
admin.ibanHint: Needed for QR payments. Clear it and members can't pay themselves in.
admin.invalidIban: That IBAN doesn't look right — double-check it.
admin.bankingFailed: Couldn't save — check the fields and try again.
admin.clubMarginUntrackedNote: {count, plural, one {# beer has no buy price — margin doesn't include it.} other {# beers have no buy price — margin doesn't include them.}}
admin.buyPriceHint: Optional. Set it to see per-unit margin and the club total.
admin.beerTypeBuyAboveSell: Sell price must be at least the buy price.
admin.noBeerTypes: No beers yet — add the first one.
admin.duplicateName: There's already a beer with that name.
admin.beerTypeFieldsError: Check the fields and try again.
admin.restockFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
admin.wouldGoNegative: That'd take the fridge below zero.
admin.adjustmentFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
admin.invalidQuantity: Pop in a whole number above zero.
admin.invalidDelta: Pop in a whole number (minus to take away).
admin.reversePaymentConfirm: Reverse the confirmed payment of {amount}? The member will owe it again.
admin.reversePaymentFailed: Couldn't reverse the payment. Try again.

clubConfig.title: Club config
clubConfig.subtitle: Settings every member's screens read from.
clubConfig.currencyHint: ISO 4217 code — CZK, EUR, USD, etc.
clubConfig.saveFailed: Couldn't save — check the fields and try again.
clubConfig.invalidCurrency: Currency must be three uppercase letters (ISO 4217).
clubConfig.currencyChangeBody: Switching from {oldCurrency} to {newCurrency} only changes how FUTURE amounts display. Existing entries stay denominated in {oldCurrency}.

errors.unauthorized: You'll need to sign in for that.
errors.boundaryBody: Sorry — something fell over here. Give it another go.

forms.mustBePositive: Needs to be more than zero.
forms.amountHint: A comma or a dot works — like 120,50
